design_philosophy.core_loop: Destroy enemy formations and hidden destructible tiles to accumulate high score while navigating vertical scrolling playfield; destroy mini-bosses before they attack for bonus points
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Score chasing against time pressure in arcade-style timed gauntlet; proximity-based positioning requirements for point multipliers
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Pilot a fighter craft through waves of enemies, mastering weapon variety and spatial positioning to achieve tournament-competitive high scores
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Arcade-purist design focused entirely on high score achievement as primary objective; eschews narrative in favor of mechanical mastery and score-chasing tournaments; distinctive weapon power-up system and hidden destructible elements reward exploration and pattern recognition

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Caravan Mode provides timed score-attack structure; player choice of weapon power-ups influences difficulty curve dynamically

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon power-ups collected from defeated enemies and hidden destructible tiles modify ship capabilities
progression.unlock_mechanism: Hidden destructible tiles provide bonus points when destroyed; proximity-based scoring mechanics require learning enemy patterns
replayability_hooks: Caravan Mode time-attack high score competition structure
Hidden destructible tile discovery and optimal destruction routes

boss_design.philosophy: Mini-boss encounters positioned as timed threats; defeating them before they attack awards bonus points, creating risk-reward tension

danger_signals: Tournament culture indicator: developed as spiritual successor to Tecmo's Star Force for 'Hudson All-Japan Caravan Festival' tournaments
Competitive high-score leaderboard design implies community-driven skill comparison
